description: Delivers all system-level screens and states: offline detection (full screen + inline banner), server error screen, maintenance mode, force update screen, and Android background kill recovery. This MVP makes the app production-hardened for real-world network and lifecycle conditions. Android-first priority.

api.name: getAppConfig
api.description: Returns app config flags: maintenanceMode (boolean), minimumVersion (string), currentVersion (string). Called on cold start before auth bootstrap.

connectivity.installation_note: Add to package.json dependencies. Requires expo install @react-native-community/netinfo

launch_with_no_internet.description: App opens with zero connectivity. Full-screen NoInternetScreen shown. Retry button re-checks connection.
behavior: Check connectivity before auth bootstrap runs
If offline: show NoInternetScreen, block auth bootstrap
Retry button: re-check NetInfo, if online resume bootstrap
If cached session exists and offline: allow app access with stale data badge (optional — see out_of_scope)

mid_session_drop.description: User is in the app and loses internet. Inline banner appears at top of screen. Does not navigate away.
behavior: NetInfo event listener in root layout
On disconnect: set isOffline=true in useUIStore, OfflineBanner slides down
On reconnect: set isOffline=false, OfflineBanner slides up and disappears
Banner is non-interactive — just informs the user
TanStack Query pauses background refetch while offline — refetchOnReconnect: true handles resume

force_update.description: Backend returns minimumVersion in /api/app/config. If installed app version < minimumVersion, show ForceUpdateScreen. Non-dismissable.
force_update.version_comparison: Use semver comparison. expo-constants provides Constants.expoConfig.version.
force_update.android_behavior: Use Linking.openURL to deep link to Play Store listing. URL: market://details?id=<package_name>
force_update.check_timing: On cold start, after connectivity check, before auth bootstrap

maintenance_mode.description: Backend returns maintenanceMode=true in /api/app/config. Show MaintenanceModeScreen. Non-dismissable. Shows maintenanceMessage if provided.
maintenance_mode.check_timing: Same as force update — on cold start app config fetch

server_error.description: Backend returns 5xx on critical calls (app config, session). Show ServerErrorScreen with retry.
behavior: Distinguish from no-internet — device is online, backend is down
Show retry button — re-attempts the failed call
Log to logger.error with response status and endpoint

android_background_kill_recovery.description: Android OS kills the app in background. On resume, React Navigation state may be stale. Session must be revalidated.
behavior: On resume from background: check token expiry via secureStore
If refresh fails: sessionExpiredModalVisible=true (wired in MVP 2)
Navigation state: Expo Router handles persistence via AsyncStorage by default — verify this is enabled
Do not re-run full bootstrap on resume — only token expiry check

ui_store_additions.description: Add these fields to src/store/slices/ui.slice.ts in this MVP

boot_sequence.description: Complete cold start sequence incorporating all MVP 4 checks. This replaces the MVP 1 bootstrap.
steps: 2. Check NetInfo.fetch() — if offline: show NoInternetScreen, stop here
4. If fetch fails (5xx or network error): show ServerErrorScreen with retry, stop here
5. If config.maintenanceMode=true: show MaintenanceModeScreen, stop here
6. If semver(appVersion) < semver(config.minimumVersion): show ForceUpdateScreen, stop here
7. Run auth bootstrap (MVP 2 session hydration sequence)

pages.name: NoInternetScreen
pages.description: Shown on launch with zero connectivity. Full screen. Retry button.

actions.name: retry
actions.description: Re-check connectivity and resume boot sequence

pages.name: OfflineBanner
pages.route: inline — rendered at top of RootLayout below status bar
pages.description: Slides down when mid-session connectivity drops. Slides up on reconnect. Never full-screen.

pages.name: ServerErrorScreen
pages.description: Shown when backend is reachable but returns 5xx. Retry re-attempts app config fetch.

pages.name: MaintenanceModeScreen
pages.description: Non-dismissable. Shows maintenanceMessage from backend if provided.

pages.name: ForceUpdateScreen
pages.description: Non-dismissable. Update Now button deep-links to Play Store (Android) or App Store (iOS).

actions.name: openStore
actions.description: Open Play Store or App Store to update the app

data_flow: 3. GET /api/app/config: if 5xx → ServerErrorScreen; if maintenanceMode → MaintenanceModeScreen; if outdated version → ForceUpdateScreen
4. All checks pass → auth bootstrap runs (MVP 2 sequence)
5. Mid-session: NetInfo listener fires on disconnect → isOffline=true → OfflineBanner slides down
6. On reconnect: isOffline=false → OfflineBanner slides up → TanStack Query refetchOnReconnect triggers
7. App resumes from background → AppState listener → token expiry check → silent refresh or sessionExpiredModal

acceptance_criteria.given: Device has no internet when app launches
acceptance_criteria.then: NoInternetScreen is shown. Auth bootstrap does not run. Retry button re-checks connectivity.

acceptance_criteria.given: User is on the home screen and loses internet
acceptance_criteria.then: OfflineBanner slides in from top. User remains on home screen. Navigation is not interrupted.

acceptance_criteria.when: App config is fetched on cold start
acceptance_criteria.then: MaintenanceModeScreen is shown. User cannot proceed into the app.

acceptance_criteria.given: Installed app version is 1.0.0 and minimumVersion is 2.0.0
acceptance_criteria.then: ForceUpdateScreen is shown with Update Now button. App is unusable until updated.

acceptance_criteria.given: Android OS kills the app in background
acceptance_criteria.then: Token expiry is checked. If valid, app resumes normally. If expired, SessionExpiredModal appears.

acceptance_criteria.given: Backend returns 500 on app config fetch
acceptance_criteria.then: ServerErrorScreen shown. Error logged via logger.error. Retry button re-attempts the fetch.

edge_cases: OfflineBanner animation must use Reanimated withTiming on UI thread — JS thread jank during scroll is unacceptable
ForceUpdateScreen on Android: market:// deep link may fail on emulators without Play Store — fallback to https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=<package>
NetInfo on Android may report isConnected=true but no actual internet (captive portal) — use isInternetReachable for more accurate check
App config fetch timeout: set 5s AbortController timeout — don't hang the boot sequence on a slow backend
If /api/app/config endpoint doesn't exist yet on backend: catch 404 and treat as no maintenance/no force update — don't block boot
OfflineBanner and SessionExpiredModal could theoretically both be visible — OfflineBanner takes precedence visually (z-index)
Android back button on ForceUpdateScreen and MaintenanceModeScreen must exit the app — handle with BackHandler.exitApp()
out_of_scope: Offline data access with cached TanStack Query data — template shows offline screen only, offline-first caching is app-level concern
Push notification permission primer screen — not in this MVP
Slow connection / timeout state UI — server error screen covers the failure case
In-app review (rate app) — not in template scope
Changelog / what's new screen — not in template scope
